issues.description: SearchDeck filter is inverted: the card specifies 'cost of 4 or more' but DSL has maxCost: 4, which means cost ≤ 4. Should use minCost: 4 instead.
Missing lookCount parameter: effect should look at exactly 4 cards from top of deck, but DSL doesn't specify this.
Missing upTo parameter: effect says 'up to 1 card', meaning it's optional. DSL should include upTo: 1 to indicate this.
Missing restDestination: the effect specifies 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order', which should be encoded in the DSL.
